title: Silver Age Fast Grass
description: Returns the nostalgic, vibrant side grass texture from 1.8.
body:
**1.500 Downloads! Thank you for downloading my project :)**

Older MC versions had a different texture for grass blocks when the graphics were set to fast, making the side texture having the same, high saturated green on all biomes.
This was removed since 1.9, when the side grass texture overlay (that changed colors depending on the biome) would no longer become invisible on fast graphics.
![Regular grass texture](https://i.imgur.com/nbhPPOv.png) ![Grass texture on fast graphics in versions before 1.9](https://i.imgur.com/RPKLs5U.png)

![A world in 1.4.7, fast graphics.](https://i.imgur.com/AGHUgcY.png)
![Same world on 1.20.1 using this resource pack.](https://i.imgur.com/zZVnFYX.png)
![Clear example.](https://i.imgur.com/W2cevkZ.png)
The resource pack, even if it happens to be tagged as outdated inside of Minecraft on versions past 1.20.1, will work on any modern version.
